Join Us

We’re a great place to work! Since 1991, Beth Tikvah Foundation of Hamilton has been providing services for people with developmental disabilities.

We recognize that our successes can only happen with the assistance of our most valued resources, our employees. We are committed to hiring, retaining, and recognizing the commitment and dedication of our qualified staff, and the expertise and passion they bring to the organization and the field of Developmental Disabilities.

Join us! Our work is satisfying, full of variety, and especially rewarding whether we share laughter or celebrate an achievement with an individual we support. We work alongside our individuals to help promote their independence and dignity.

Career Building Opportunities

Beth Tikvah Foundation of Hamilton offers part-time and full-time opportunities with a generous compensation package. We strongly believe in the professional development of our employees through extensive employer-paid training. In addition, we make every effort to promote from within so that our employees can strive to build meaningful careers. We generally hire part-time staff and promote from within the agency to fill full-time openings.

Current Employment Opportunities

Now Hiring: Part-Time Support Workers

We typically seek applicants with at least one (1) year of professional experience working in the field of Developmental Disabilities; who also possess post-secondary ed
